title: Rewrite ROADMAP.md — all Phase 1 items are already done
Fix CORS: allow_origins wildcard + allow_credentials=True is invalid in browsers
Agent-First CLI — make LifeOS a tool Hermes can use
description: Epic tracking the full agent-first redesign of LifeOS. PRD at: /home/polis/projects/lifeOS/docs/PRD-agent-first.md. Three sprints: S1=wire it (brief+sync CLI + cron), S2=capture (log+status), S3=intelligence (goal+pattern+weekly). Sprint gates: S2 only starts after S1 acceptance test passes for 14 days. S3 only starts after S2 running in practice.

title: S1: Persist EnergyPredictor model weights to DB across restarts
description: EnergyPredictor in src/energy_predictor.py trains a linear regression model but never persists weights. get_energy_predictor() returns a new untrained singleton on every cold start — meaning the predictor never learns. Fix: serialize model params via get_model_params(), store to DB or file on train, load via load_model_params() on first predict call. See REVIEW.md item 3 and pol-69ed (Polis-level bead). This must ship before cli/brief or brief quality is degraded on every invocation.

title: S1: Add click to requirements.txt and lifeos entry point to setup
S1: Build cli/main.py — lifeos brief + lifeos sync commands
description: New files: cli/__init__.py, cli/main.py. Use click. Both commands are thin wrappers over the service layer — NO business logic in CLI. Use: from src.database import SessionLocal, init_db / from src.insights_service import InsightsService. Brief output: --format text (Discord markdown, default), --format json ({status, data:{content,date,confidence}, generated_at, tokens_used}). Sync output: 'Synced N records' to stdout. Errors to stderr always. Exit codes: 0=success, 1=bad args, 2=system failure. Depends on pol-e603 (formatters).

title: S1: Build cli/formatters.py — json + text output formatters with stdout/stderr contract
description: New file: cli/formatters.py. Provides: format_brief(insight, format) -> str, format_sync_result(result, format) -> str, format_error(msg) -> str. JSON schema: {status: ok|error, data: {...}, generated_at: ISO8601}. Text format: clean markdown suitable for direct Discord paste. Must enforce stdout/stderr contract: formatters write data to stdout (via return value), never to stderr.

title: S1: Configure OpenClaw cron for 7am morning brief (sync oura → generate brief → deliver Discord)
description: Create OpenClaw cron at 07:00 Europe/Helsinki. Bash sequence: (1) cd /home/polis/projects/lifeOS && source .venv/bin/activate (2) lifeos sync oura || true (3) lifeos sync calendar || true (4) BRIEF=$(lifeos brief --format text) (5) deliver BRIEF to Discord — via relay send or direct DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL POST. Cron is a Sprint 1 acceptance criterion — it must run and deliver a real brief. Not 'set up', actually delivered.

title: S1: Verify .env has OURA_TOKEN + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL — test end-to-end
description: Pre-flight checklist for Sprint 1: (1) OURA_TOKEN set in .env and valid — test with: lifeos sync oura (2) DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL set and working — test with a curl POST (3) DB initialised: lifeos brief runs without error (4) Oura data present in DB — at least 7 days to seed the AI context. If Oura token missing, get from https://cloud.ouraring.com/personal-access-tokens. Perttu must provide these credentials.

title: S1 ACCEPTANCE: Morning brief delivered to Discord for 3 consecutive days
